metadata.desc: An Astrbot plugin for managing QQ groups, designed for HTS Team management. Supports welcome messages, admin management and other features.

whitelist_enabled.hint: When enabled, only groups in the whitelist can use plugin features

group_whitelist.hint: Enter group IDs, one per line. When whitelist is enabled, only listed groups can use plugin features

welcome_global_enabled.hint: Global master switch. When disabled, welcome messages will be disabled for all groups

welcome_default_enabled.description: Enable welcome for new groups by default
welcome_default_enabled.hint: Whether to enable welcome messages by default when a new group triggers for the first time

default_mute_duration.hint: Default mute duration when not specified

default_welcome_message.hint: Leave empty to use i18n default. Supported variables: {membername} = new member's name

max_recall_count.hint: Maximum messages that can be recalled at once

enable_long_message_merge.hint: When enabled, messages longer than threshold will be sent intact as a single-node merged message

long_message_threshold.hint: Messages longer than this will be wrapped intact as a merged message without splitting. Default: 350 characters

sentinel_settings.hint: Configure inspection monitoring and detection rules

sentinel_enabled.hint: Global master switch. When enabled, Inspection will automatically detect group messages and apply rules

sentinel_group_blacklist.hint: Groups in this list will not be monitored by Inspection. Enter group IDs, one per line

sentinel_user_whitelist.hint: Users in this list will not trigger Inspection detection. Enter QQ numbers, one per line

sentinel_rules_group.hint: Configure detection rules for keyword and message type monitoring

sentinel_rules.hint: Click the Add button to select a rule template. Supports keyword rules and message type rules

keyword_rule.name: Keyword Rule
keyword_rule.hint: Detect text content based on keyword/regex matching

keywords.hint: Supports regular expressions, one keyword per line

time_range.hint: e.g. Mon-Fri 09:00-18:00 or 22:00-02:00, leave empty for all day

groups.hint: Leave empty to apply to all groups

mute_duration.hint: 0=no mute, -1=no recall no mute. Supports range like 60~300

ignore_admin.hint: When enabled, admin messages will not trigger this rule

ignore_owner.hint: When enabled, group owner messages will not trigger this rule

rule_user_whitelist.hint: Users in this list will not trigger this rule. Enter QQ numbers, one per line

rule_user_monitor_list.hint: Leave empty to monitor all members

kick_threshold.hint: Kick user when hit count reaches this threshold. 0=disabled

type_rule.name: Message Type Rule
type_rule.hint: Detect based on message type (image/voice/video etc.)

msg_types.hint: Options: text / image / voice / video / file / face / forward / json, one per line

time_range.hint: e.g. Mon-Fri 09:00-18:00 or 22:00-02:00, leave empty for all day

groups.hint: Leave empty to apply to all groups

mute_duration.hint: 0=no mute, -1=no recall no mute. Supports range like 60~300

ignore_admin.hint: When enabled, admin messages will not trigger this rule

ignore_owner.hint: When enabled, group owner messages will not trigger this rule

rule_user_whitelist.hint: Users in this list will not trigger this rule. Enter QQ numbers, one per line

rule_user_monitor_list.hint: Leave empty to monitor all members

kick_threshold.hint: Kick user when hit count reaches this threshold. 0=disabled

messages.cmd_set_essence: /bot set_essence - Set the quoted message as group essence
messages.cmd_remove_essence: /bot remove_essence - Remove the quoted group essence message
messages.msg_not_in_group: ❌ Please use this command in a group chat
messages.msg_no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission to do this
messages.msg_platform_not_supported: ❌ This feature is not supported on current platform
messages.msg_operation_failed: ❌ Operation failed, please try again later
messages.msg_set_essence_success: ✅ Quoted message set as group essence
messages.msg_essence_no_reply: ❌ Please reply to (quote) the target message first, then use this command
messages.msg_command_not_found: ❌ Command not found, use /bot help to see available commands
